sanskrit:
अप्रकाशोऽप्रवृत्तिश्च प्रमादो मोह एव च।
तमस्येतानि जायन्ते विवृद्धे कुरुनन्दन।।
transliteration:
aprakāśo ’pravṛttiś ca pramādo moha eva ca
tamasy etāni jāyante vivṛddhe kuru-nandana
literal_meaning: Darkness, inactivity, heedlessness, and illusion—these arise when the mode of ignorance increases, O joy of the Kurus.
contextual_meaning: When tamas predominates, the mind loses clarity, motivation, and discernment, sinking into a fog of apathy, confusion, and self-deception.
psychological_state: Depressive-like shutdown: low energy, poor insight, avoidance, and unconscious self-sabotage.
trigger_scenario: Scrolling social media for hours, feeling drained yet unable to stop or start anything meaningful.
anchor_text: Ignorance clouds the mind; seek light through mindful action and knowledge.
